title: Haywen RP Cogs&Paws
description: The modpack with a Roleplay focus, species and designed to empower creators! Used in the Haywen SMP server!
body:
# DEVELPMENT IS INDEFINATELY ON HIATUS, THE MODPACK IS PRESENTED AS IS AND FREE TO USE. ![Cogs And Paw's](https://i.imgur.com/3fL9HGi.png) Dive into a modpack tailored for role-players and tinkerers, offering a journey through steampunk contraptions powered by [create](), modern and [immersive vehicles]() and futuristic storage powered by [applied energistics 2](). Collaborate with friends to build partnerships and society, explore advanced technologies, and embark on a shared adventure. Our curated mods enhance creativity and offer endless possibilities for individual and cooperative gameplay. But if technology isn't your thing, there is plenty of whimsical magics for all you [wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards), [paladins](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests), and [archers](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) out there. Burn your enemies (or friends, if so inclined) with fireballs and combine them to make powerful [invocations](https://modrinth.com/mod/invocations). Finally, why not flesh out your world with plenty of building blocks and furniture ([Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn) —and much more), to help you create the perfect architectural wonder! # ![](https://i.imgur.com/zdjEOto.png) ![https://i.imgur.com/IR1hCwR.png](https://i.imgur.com/IR1hCwR.png) 1) unique experiences for all (mods to tailor experiences to what each player is seeking) 2) immersion (mods that improve the look and feel so people don't feel as confined) 3) community (mods that encourage player interaction) # ![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013858280633806851/1155161966424367134/engaging_roleplay.png) ![](https://imgur.com/P8OEsgq/?size=900x100) ![https://i.imgur.com/ZJH6y0U.png](https://i.imgur.com/ZJH6y0U.png) Our commitment to enhancing roleplay experiences lies in the versatility provided by [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) and [pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui), to help with a diverse cast of characters. Shrink yourself to perfect pixie proportions or be an overbearing cuddly bear. # ![Alt text](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013858280633806851/1155154093833211945/empowering_creators.png) At haywen, we are a diverse group of creators, be it youtube, art, and expression. We push to empower creators and give you the tools. [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod/) is one of our most used tools, supplemented by [Creator Overlay](https://modrinth.com/mod/creatoroverlays) to help you get that perfect shot!
![About Us!](https://haywen.com/assets/images/image21.jpg?v=8898bb0e)

Visit Haywen.com!

#### Thanks to these amazing mods!
Mods list (It was so big i had to use a google sheets)

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dSco4HJXETs49h8tlL_VVLUG9GqwEtlVg5PPAa4qxQI/edit?usp=sharing

# Regarding permissions

Permission recieved from: [MehVahdJukaar](https://i.imgur.com/TJOIO1I.png) of Carpeted Stairs (FABRIC)
Permission recieved from: [Terrariumearth](https://i.imgur.com/iRXUEY0.png) of Lil'wings
Permission recieved from [ZsoltMolnarrr ](https://i.imgur.com/7CE28e6.png)of [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards), [Paladins](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests), [archery](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) and [jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)
